economic_notes: COVID-19 pandemic caused some project delays and postponements, resulting in reduction in funding from primary funder. Nation is economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada and First Nations Health Authority.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 but auditor report is dated July 23, 2019 — likely a typographical error in the document. Consolidated entities include 1111940 Limited Partnership and 1111940 British Columbia Ltd. Accumulated surplus per Note 10 is $23,709,029 while Statement 2 shows $23,670,106 — minor discrepancy likely due to rounding or reimbursement adjustments. Capital lease obligation of $30,235 exists in addition to long-term debt. Reimbursements of $948,039 added to accumulated surplus in current year. OSR calculated as miscellaneous income + rental + interest on trust moneys = $351,924; however gaming revenue ($518,106) and Province of BC ($184,970) may also be considered transfers depending on classification — OSR here excludes all identified government transfers. No schedule of remuneration provided.
